title: Absence board

posts.author: TanyaDigi (Tanya)
posts.cookedHtml:
If this has already been asked and I couldn’t find it, I would appreciate the guidance as to where the answer is.

We need a board where the employees will mark only if they will be absent for any reason (vacation, illness/half day) - as advance planning.
Employees are divided into categories (project manager, developer, IT, etc.)
It’s best to have it on a monthly schedule.
Preferably - there should be a request for administrator approval\ and only if approval appears in this color, otherwise pending or in another color for refusal.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Tanya!

Charlotte here from the monday team! Just gonna list some ideas/resources below and perhaps our Community can contribute some expertise from their own use cases

  • Employees vacation tracking and planning template

  • Statuses with custom labels for their categories (project manager, developer, etc) or using dropdown columns.

  • Recurring automations for refreshing the date and timeline columns every month

  • Utilizing forms to submit PTO/absence notices or requests that come into your board as items, with a default value of “pending”, and then administrators can change the status to “approved”.

I hope this is helpful! Let me know your thoughts and we can go from there!
